diagrams.title: TSP Complexity Growth
diagrams.description: Shows exponential explosion of brute-force solutions as cities increase
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why brute-force becomes impractical quickly

diagrams.title: Branch and Bound Tree
diagrams.description: Tree structure showing branching on city selection with pruning
diagrams.purpose: Understand how branch and bound reduces search space

diagrams.title: 2-opt Improvement
diagrams.description: Shows how removing and re-adding two edges improves tour
elements: Before: edges A-B and C-D crossing
After: edges A-C and B-D connected

diagrams.title: Nearest Neighbor Step-by-Step
diagrams.description: Greedy selection process through a small graph
